name: STS2 Community
description: Community-maintained annotations for Slay the Spire 2.

payloads.title: Map icon
payloads.text: Click to view the act map.

payloads.title: Ice Cream
payloads.text: Relic — Ice Cream. Gain 3 Energy at the start of each turn.

payloads.title: Floor
payloads.text: The current floor the player has reached.

payloads.title: Ascension 10
payloads.text:
- ~60% more Elites will spawn.
- Ancients only heal 80% of your missing HP.
- Enemies and Treasure Chests drop 25% less Gold.
- Start each run with 1 less potion slot.
- Start each run with an Ascender's Bane curse card.
- Card removes at The Merchant start at 100 Gold; each subsequent remove costs 50 Gold more.
- Rare and Upgraded cards appear half as often.
- All Enemies have more HP.
- All Enemies deal more damage.

payloads.title: Back Arrow
payloads.text: Return to the Floor in Progress

payloads.title: Cracked Core
payloads.text: At the start of each combat, Channel 1 Lightning Orb.

payloads.title: Gambling Chip
payloads.text: At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

payloads.title: Stolen Card
payloads.text: This enemy has stolen one of the player's cards.  They will have the choice to take it back if they defeat the enemy before it flees.

payloads.title: Eternal Feather
payloads.text: For every 5 cards in your deck, heal 3 HP whenever you enter a Rest Site.

payloads.title: Relic - Black Star
payloads.text: Elites drop an additional Relic when defeated.
